options.query: index=your_index | eval app=coalesce(application, app_name, service_name) | eval url=coalesce(url, uri, endpoint, request_path) | eval is_success=if(http_status>=200 AND http_status<400,1,0) | eval is_failure=if(http_status>=400 OR status="FAILURE" OR result="ERROR",1,0) | stats sum(is_success) as success_count sum(is_failure) as failure_count count as total_count by app url | eval failure_pct=round((failure_count/total_count)*100,2) | eval url_rag=if(failure_pct>10,"Red",if(failure_pct>5,"Amber","Green")) | eval green_cnt=if(url_rag="Green",1,0) | eval amber_cnt=if(url_rag="Amber",1,0) | eval red_cnt=if(url_rag="Red",1,0) | stats sum(green_cnt) as Green sum(amber_cnt) as Amber sum(red_cnt) as Red sum(success_count) as Success sum(failure_count) as Failure sum(total_count) as Total by app | eval FailurePct=round((Failure/Total)*100,2) | eval ImpactCount=Failure | eval OverallRAG=if(Red>0,"Red",if(Amber>0,"Amber","Green")) | rename app as Application | table Application Green Amber Red Success Failure Total FailurePct ImpactCount OverallRAG | sort Application
index=your_index | eval req_status=if(http_status>=200 AND http_status<400,"Success","Failure") | timechart span=5m count by req_status

index=your_index | eval app=coalesce(application, app_name, service_name) | eval url=coalesce(url, uri, endpoint, request_path) | eval is_success=if(http_status>=200 AND http_status<400,1,0) | eval is_failure=if(http_status>=400 OR status="FAILURE" OR result="ERROR",1,0) | stats sum(is_success) as Success sum(is_failure) as Failure count as Total by app url | eval FailurePct=round((Failure/Total)*100,2) | eval RAG=if(FailurePct>10,"Red",if(FailurePct>5,"Amber","Green")) | rename app as Application url as URL | table Application URL Success Failure Total FailurePct RAG | sort - Failure
index=your_index | eval is_failure=if(http_status>=400 OR status="FAILURE" OR result="ERROR",1,0) | stats sum(is_failure) as "Failed Requests"

index=your_index | eval is_failure=if(http_status>=400 OR status="FAILURE" OR result="ERROR",1,0) | stats sum(is_failure) as fail count as total | eval "Failure %"=round((fail/total)*100,2) | table "Failure %"

description: Mission Control style application health dashboard
title: Application RAG Status Dashboard
